name: tags-input
description: A free-text TAGS field (Filament TagsInput; shadcn composes Badge + Input): existing tags shown as removable chips + a text input to add more, with optional quick-pick suggestions and optional clear-all button. TIER: CLIENT-ENHANCER (form-native, NOT WIRE). Each committed tag is a chip carrying a hidden <input name=...> so the set POSTs as a repeated `name` with zero JS. JS-OFF an explicit Add submit (name=`<name>__add`) and per-chip remove submit (name=`<name>__remove`) round-trip to the server; handle those server-side to append/drop. JS-ON a CSP-clean typed-TS enhancer makes editing in-place: Enter/delimiter/Add appends a chip + hidden input, the chip x removes it, Backspace-on-empty pops the last, paste splits on the delimiter. Chip keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End) uses roving tabindex. An aria-live region announces add/remove. Hidden inputs stay the form source of truth. WAI-ARIA BUILT model (no APG pattern for token entry): root role=group aria-labelledby; chips role=option aria-selected=true roving tabindex; live region role=status. Size param (sm/md/lg) controls well min-height and chip height. clearable=true shows a clear-all button when tags are present. delimiter param controls paste-split and keydown trigger. dataAttrs param for SAFE dynamic data-* on root.
docs: Copies the tags-input partial to your JTE root at lievit/tags-input.jte (reached as @template.lievit.tags-input(name=..., values=...)) and the CSP-clean enhancer to lievit/tags-input.enhancer.ts. Import the enhancer once from your entry module and call enhanceAllTagsInputs() on load (and after any DOM swap). The committed tags POST as a repeated `name` (a hidden input per chip). JS-OFF the user adds via the Add submit (`<name>__add`) and removes via the per-chip submit (`<name>__remove`), both server round-trips; handle those parameters server-side to append/drop. JS-ON the enhancer adds on Enter/delimiter/Add and removes via the chip x, all in place, and hides the Add button. Paste splits on the `delimiter` param (default comma). Chip keyboard navigation: ArrowLeft/Right between chips, ArrowLeft from entry at pos 0 goes to last chip, ArrowRight from last chip goes to entry, Home/End, Delete/Backspace/Enter/Space on chip removes it and restores focus. `clearable=true` shows a clear-all button when tags non-empty. `size` (sm/md/lg) controls well min-height and chip height. Pass `values` (existing tags), optional `suggestions`, `label`/`ariaLabel`/`describedBy`, `placeholder`, `addLabel`, `delimiter`, `size`, `disabled`, `invalid`, `clearable`. The source is yours: edit freely.
